# RTDS Operations Catalog

Inventory of every RTDS operation: its pattern, whether a Vocalls component and/or a runtime
twin exists, whether it has seed SQL, and links to the spec, component, and runtime handler.

Source of truth for status:
- **Component** ‚Äî file present in [`rtds/components/`](../components/).
- **Runtime** ‚Äî registration block in
  [`rtds_2_runtime.js`](../../projects/rtds-runtime/globalLibraries/active/rtds_2_runtime.js)
  (`registerRtdsOperation` = inline JS twin; `registerRtdsExit` = GUI-exit key; unregistered =
  not wired yet, `runStep` skips to `NextStep`).
- **Seed** ‚Äî present in
  [`rtds/db_seed/seed_operations_vocalls_dictionary.sql`](../db_seed/seed_operations_vocalls_dictionary.sql).

Legend: ‚úÖ present ¬∑ ‚¨ú not yet ¬∑ üîí legacy (superseded).

## Operations

| Operation | Pattern | Spec | Component | Runtime | Seed |
| --------- | ------- | ---- | --------- | ------- | ---- |
| sendSms | `http_call` | [spec](../specs/sendSms.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [sendSms.js](../components/sendSms.js) | JS twin `executeSendSms` (`sendSms`) | ‚úÖ |
| sendEmail | `http_call` | [spec](../specs/sendEmail.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [sendMail.js](../components/sendMail.js) | JS twin `executeSendEmail` (`sendMail`) | ‚úÖ |
| setVariables | `set_attributes` | [spec](../specs/setVariables.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [setVariables.js](../components/setVariables.js) | JS twin `executeSetVariables` (`setVariables`) | ‚úÖ |
| guardRouting | `http_call` + multi-node | [spec](../specs/guardRouting.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [guardRouting.js](../components/guardRouting.js) | GUI-exit `guard_routing` (via `guard`) | ‚úÖ |
| guardTui | `http_call` + multi-node | [spec](../specs/guardTui.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [guardTui.js](../components/guardTui.js) | GUI-exit `guard_tui` (`guardTui`) | ‚úÖ |
| scheduler | `http_call` composite (single status call ‚Üí embedded say) | [spec](../specs/scheduler.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [checkSchedule.js](../components/checkSchedule.js) | ‚¨ú not registered | ‚¨ú |
| internalTransfer | composite (`redirect` primitive) | [spec](../specs/internalTransfer.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [internalTransfer.js](../components/internalTransfer.js) | ‚¨ú not registered | ‚¨ú |
| externalTransfer | composite (`redirect` primitive) | [spec](../specs/externalTransfer.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [externalTransfer.js](../components/externalTransfer.js) | ‚¨ú not registered | ‚¨ú |
| say | `gui_exit` + say primitive | [spec](../specs/say.spec.md) | ‚úÖ [say.js](../components/say.js) | GUI-exit `play_prompt` (`say`) | ‚úÖ |

> in [`rtds/specs/`](../specs/) are catalogued above. Add a row (and its spec) when a new
